products.title: Night Wardens Core Rules — Pilot Digital
products.label: PILOT EDITION • CORE GAME
products.description: The playable core rulebook for Night Wardens: roles, investigations, combat, gear, supernatural systems, and the foundation of the Digital Field Office.

products.title: Night Wardens Bestiary — Pilot Digital
products.label: PILOT EDITION • EXPANSION
products.description: A classified threat archive of creatures, entities, signs, weaknesses, behavior patterns, and field guidance for Game Wardens.

products.title: Night Wardens Tarot Guide + Story Engine — Pilot Digital
products.label: PILOT EDITION • SOLO / AUTO-GM
products.description: The tarot-driven case, campaign, and solo play engine for Night Wardens, built to generate hunts, escalation, clues, and fallout.

products.title: Night Wardens Grimoire — Pilot Digital
products.label: PILOT EDITION • OCCULT EXPANSION
products.description: A field grimoire of rites, spell logic, occult workings, supernatural costs, and dangerous methods for Wardens who cross the line carefully.
